mapper.sql: select a.visit_id, a.visit_no, a.applicant_user_id, au.user_name as applicant_user_name, a.applicant_dept_id, ad.dept_name as applicant_dept_name, a.customer_type, a.contract_dept_id, a.contract_config_id, a.customer_id, a.customer_name_snapshot, a.contact_person_snapshot, a.contact_phone_snapshot, a.visit_address, a.planned_start_time, a.planned_end_time, a.visit_reason, a.visit_target, a.companion_members, a.status, a.approve_role_id_snapshot, a.approve_user_id, pu.user_name as approve_user_name, a.approve_time, a.approve_comment, a.actual_start_time, a.actual_end_time, a.result_desc, a.visit_conclusion, a.intention_level, a.next_follow_time, a.result_attachments, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.del_flag from fe_visit_apply a left join sys_user au on a.applicant_user_id = au.user_id left join sys_dept ad on a.applicant_dept_id = ad.dept_id left join sys_user pu on a.approve_user_id = pu.user_id
mapper.select:
select c.config_id, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.contract_no, d.leader as contact_person, d.phone as contact_phone from sys_dept_api_config c left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id
c.status = '1' and d.del_flag = '0'
and c.dept_id in
#{deptId}
order by d.dept_name asc, c.config_id asc

select c.config_id, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.contract_no, d.leader as contact_person, d.phone as contact_phone from sys_dept_api_config c left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id where c.config_id = #{configId} limit 1
select visit_no from fe_visit_apply where visit_no like concat(#{prefix}, '%') order by visit_no desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into fe_visit_apply ( visit_no, applicant_user_id, applicant_dept_id, customer_type, contract_dept_id, contract_config_id, customer_id, customer_name_snapshot, contact_person_snapshot, contact_phone_snapshot, visit_address, planned_start_time, planned_end_time, visit_reason, visit_target, companion_members, status, approve_role_id_snapshot, approve_user_id, approve_time, approve_comment, actual_start_time, actual_end_time, result_desc, visit_conclusion, intention_level, next_follow_time, result_attachments, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag ) values ( #{visitNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{applicantDeptId}, #{customerType}, #{contractDeptId}, #{contractConfigId}, #{customerId}, #{customerNameSnapshot}, #{contactPersonSnapshot}, #{contactPhoneSnapshot}, #{visitAddress}, #{plannedStartTime}, #{plannedEndTime}, #{visitReason}, #{visitTarget}, #{companionMembers}, #{status}, #{approveRoleIdSnapshot}, #{approveUserId}, #{approveTime}, #{approveComment}, #{actualStartTime}, #{actualEndTime}, #{resultDesc}, #{visitConclusion}, #{intentionLevel}, #{nextFollowTime}, #{resultAttachments}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag} )
mapper.update: update fe_visit_apply set applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId}, applicant_dept_id = #{applicantDeptId}, customer_type = #{customerType}, contract_dept_id = #{contractDeptId}, contract_config_id = #{contractConfigId}, customer_id = #{customerId}, customer_name_snapshot = #{customerNameSnapshot}, contact_person_snapshot = #{contactPersonSnapshot}, contact_phone_snapshot = #{contactPhoneSnapshot}, visit_address = #{visitAddress}, planned_start_time = #{plannedStartTime}, planned_end_time = #{plannedEndTime}, visit_reason = #{visitReason}, visit_target = #{visitTarget}, companion_members = #{companionMembers}, status = #{status}, approve_role_id_snapshot = #{approveRoleIdSnapshot}, approve_user_id = #{approveUserId}, approve_time = #{approveTime}, approve_comment = #{approveComment}, actual_start_time = #{actualStartTime}, actual_end_time = #{actualEndTime}, result_desc = #{resultDesc}, visit_conclusion = #{visitConclusion}, intention_level = #{intentionLevel}, next_follow_time = #{nextFollowTime}, result_attachments = #{resultAttachments}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark}, del_flag = #{delFlag} where visit_id = #{visitId}
